Claim Form (CPR Part 7)
In the High Court of Justice, Technology and Construction Court
Claim No. HT-2025-000999
Issued: 5 June 2025

Claimant: Meridian Retail Group plc
Defendant: TechFlow Solutions Limited

Value: The amount claimed is approximately £6,000,000.

Statement of Truth: The Claimant believes that the facts stated in this Claim Form are true.

PARTICULARS OF CLAIM

The parties
1. The Claimant ("Meridian") operates a chain of retail stores in the United Kingdom.
2. The Defendant ("TechFlow") designs and implements retail software systems.

The Agreement
3. By a written Master Services Agreement dated 14 March 2024, TechFlow agreed to design, build and implement a cloud-based inventory and EPOS platform for Meridian, with a go-live date fixed at 1 October 2024.

Breaches
4. In breach of the Agreement, TechFlow delivered the Platform late; the Platform did not go live until 18 November 2024, some seven weeks after the contractual go-live date of 1 October 2024.
5. Meridian did not at any time request any change to the agreed scope of the works, and all delay was caused by TechFlow's failure to allocate adequate and competent resources.
6. Further, TechFlow failed to provide adequate training to Meridian's staff in the use of the Platform.

Loss and damage
7. By reason of the matters aforesaid Meridian has suffered loss and damage in the sum of approximately £6,000,000, including wasted expenditure of £1,800,000.

Statement of Truth
The Claimant believes that the facts stated in these Particulars of Claim are true.
